title: Sunken Temple
description: A flooded ruin beneath the marshlands holds treasures and dangers in equal measure. The water is rising.

title: Whispering Keep
description: A ruined fortress on the northern moors glows at night and the nearby village cannot sleep. You have been hired to silence the whispers before the harvest moon.

title: Queen's Cipher
description: A forged invitation and a dangerous secret are your only weapons in the royal palace. The spymaster's eyes are everywhere, and time is running out.

title: Tides of Fortune
description: Your ship has broken apart on a wild coast and the storm is not finished with you. Survival is one thing - finding a way home is another.

title: Hollow Bell
description: The old chapel bell rings at midnight though no one pulls the rope. The village priest has vanished and the townsfolk will not go near the graveyard after dark.

title: Gilded Vault
description: The merchant prince keeps a stolen relic locked beneath his manor. Tonight, during the masquerade, is your only chance to take it back.

title: Thornwick Exchange
description: A locked box arrives on your doorstep the same morning you owe a guild debt by nightfall. In Thornwick Market, every buyer has their price - but not every seller knows theirs.

title: Last Lantern
description: A storm drives you through the door of a roadside inn already heavy with tension. Sergeant Vorn and his soldiers are hunting someone, and that someone just pressed a note into your hand.

title: Barrow of Mordavain
description: The lich Mordavain has slept in his sealed barrow for four centuries and no treasure hunter who has entered has ever returned. You are carrying better information than the others. That may or may not be enough.

title: Beneath Bloodstone
description: A cell beneath a dark temple. The chanting above grows louder and midnight is close. You have one chance to escape before the ritual begins.

title: Frozen Pass
description: A blizzard traps you on Greymount Pass with night falling fast. Every choice could mean warmth or a cold grave.

title: Iron Door Below
description: An ancient dwarven mine has been sealed for centuries. The merchant guild offers a fortune to whoever maps its depths, but the door was sealed for a reason.

title: Wyvern's Terms
description: A wyvern has claimed the mountain pass and the kingdom's trade road lies silent. You carry a diplomat's seal and orders to negotiate, not fight.

title: Copper Flagon
description: A silver locket has vanished from behind the bar of a crossroads inn. Five guests, one thief, and a long rainy night to sort the truth from the lies.

title: Greenwood Truce
description: Two feuding noble houses are trapped in a sealed forest with a shadow-beast on the prowl. You are the only neutral voice in the wood.

title: Storm Tower
description: A sorcerer's tower only appears during thunderstorms. Your crew has one night to climb it, steal the Heartstone, and escape before the lightning stops.

title: Minstrel's Wager
description: A traveling minstrel challenges you to a contest of wits in a rowdy tavern. The stakes are higher than they seem and every patron has an opinion.

title: Pale Garden
description: A vast fungal cavern pulses with bioluminescent light beneath the Greymoor Hills. The herbalist who entered three days ago has not returned, and the glow is spreading to the surface.

title: Broken Oath
description: Two rival mercenary captains both claim your sworn service in a border town too small for their feud. Night is falling and steel is being drawn.

title: Grayhollow Hunt
description: A beast stalks the farmsteads around Grayhollow village. The hunters who went after it came back changed. Now it is your turn to enter the fog.

title: Iron Cradle
description: You wake in a dungeon cell with no memory of your crime. The guards are gone, the torches are dying, and somewhere below the floor something is digging upward.

title: Festival Crown
description: A golden crown lies hidden somewhere in the town of Harthmere during the annual Harvest Festival. Every treasure hunter in the region has come to find it first.

title: Siege of Redwall
description: A goblin horde surrounds the border fort of Redwall and the garrison is half strength. You must hold the walls until dawn or the entire valley falls.

title: Ashenmoor Pit
description: A rigged arena tournament and a debt you did not choose. Three fights stand between you and freedom, but the pit master has plans of his own.

title: Velvet Ledger
description: A stolen map leads you into the underground market beneath the city of Ashwick. Every dealer has a price and every shadow hides a knife.

title: River of Knives
description: A dying captain, a stolen crown, and three strangers on a river barge drifting toward trouble. Trust is a luxury you cannot afford.

title: Tinker's Gambit
description: Someone in the merchant caravan is selling forged goods. Dawn brings the city inspectors. You have one night to find the forger before the whole caravan pays the price.

title: Ember Vigil
description: Raiders surround the mountain abbey and the sacred flame is dying. You must choose what to save - the people, the relic, or the fire itself.

title: Glass Oasis
description: A desert oasis has turned to glass overnight and the caravans cannot pass. Something ancient stirs beneath the sand and only a fool would go looking for it.

title: Warden's Maze
description: An enchanted hedge maze guards a tower where your companion is held. Dawn resets the paths and seals the way forever.

title: Drowned Beacon
description: A lighthouse on the edge of the world has gone dark, and ships are breaking on the rocks. You climb the cliff to relight the flame, but something already lives in the tower.

title: Court of Whispers
description: A foreign diplomat arrives dead at the royal court and every noble in the hall had reason to want him gone. You are the only one who saw what really happened.

title: Ironcrag Forge
description: A legendary smith keeps her mountain forge sealed against strangers. Tonight she is taking visitors, but the price she names is not gold.

title: Silver Oar
description: The Reedwater festival race begins at dawn and the prize is the legendary Silver Oar. Your boat is cracked, your rival is fast, and the river hides its own secrets.

title: Hawthorn Bargain
description: A fey market opens once a year beneath the hawthorn arch and every wonder inside has a hidden price. Tonight is your only chance to walk back out.

title: Skyclaw Eyrie
description: A great roc has stolen the Crown of Maelden and carried it to its nest atop a wind-blasted spire. You have until midday to climb up and back down.

title: Quiet Springs
description: A mountain bathhouse where pilgrims and nobles soak in uneasy peace. Tonight, a brass cup of pale tea is meant for a woman in a green robe.

title: Tide Pilgrimage
description: A sacred crossing on foot to Saint's Isle before the tide returns. The fog is heavy, the path is moving, and not everyone walking the flats today is a pilgrim.

title: Parley Fires
description: A war chief's horde surrounds the frontier town of Holvik and the gates will not hold past dawn. You ride out alone with a token of peace and no escort.

title: Hollow Star
description: A fallen star burns in the Brackmoor and the villages downwind have begun to forget their dead. You walk into the moor with a lantern and a debt of mercy.

title: Sleeping Court
description: An entire court sleeps mid-feast in a cursed castle, and no one has woken for forty years. You are here for the Ember Ring on the king's hand.

title: Ash Covenant
description: The volcano on Cinderpeak Isle has woken and a monastery clings to the slope. The monks cannot leave without their sacred flame - and neither can you.

title: Black Anchor
description: Two merchant guilds arm for war over a sunken ship in Saltmere harbor. A black-hulled vessel sits at anchor, unnamed, and the harbormaster has vanished.

title: Anvil Trial
description: The Forge Fair has come to Dunmere and the master smiths are watching. You are the youngest apprentice to enter the Anvil Trial in twenty years.

title: Bone Carnival
description: A traveling carnival has pitched its tents outside Fenwick village. Your sister went inside three nights ago and has not come out.

title: Healer's Choice
description: Two wounded soldiers from warring kingdoms bleed on your doorstep. Your border village sits between the armies and dawn will bring a patrol.

title: Wyrm's Garden
description: A dragon died in the Thornveil valley and its hoard lies beneath the bones. The forest has grown over everything, and it is hungry.

title: Shifting Manor
description: A manor that was not on the road an hour ago invites you in from the rain. The doors lead to rooms that should not exist, and the house does not want you to leave.

title: Silver Fog
description: A fishing boat drifts into a fog that should not exist. Voices call from the water and a black ship slips alongside in the dark.

title: Hungry Walls
description: The city of Veyran has held against the siege for twenty days, but the grain stores empty too fast. You have one night to find the traitor before dawn.

title: Auction of Whispers
description: A hidden auction beneath the city sells secrets in exchange for blood. You came to buy one name and leave with your throat intact.

title: Hollow Beneath
description: A rival cartographer has vanished into the Ironroot Mines chasing a map no one believes in. You follow her lantern trail into a city that forgot the sun.

title: Vessel and the Star
description: Tonight a second star falls upon the Aerie, and the glass to catch it is cracked. Master Halder will not say what the second star truly is.

title: Test Story
description: A minimal test story with one passage and two endings.

title: Spire Heist
description: A stolen relic hums inside the Moonspire and you are the only thief foolish enough to go after it. Three ways in, one way out - if you are lucky.

title: Forgefire Trial
description: Five apprentice smiths compete for the honor of forging the king's blade. Someone has fouled your coals, and dawn will bring the final strike.

title: Marked Deck
description: A stranger in purple velvet is cleaning out the Brass Kettle at cards on feast-eve. Young Leoc has just staked his father's field, and the crowd cheers each wrong turn.

title: Singing Stones
description: At St. Cauldric's, the walls have begun to sing at midnight. A pilgrim's child has vanished into the catacombs below, and the abbot says the mountain is owed a life.

title: Banners at Wolfreach
description: A peace envoy's caravan lies in ruins on a frozen pass. You must reach Wolfreach Keep before dawn or two kingdoms bleed into war.

title: Wards of Iron
description: Imprisoned in a sorcerer's tower for a crime you didn't commit, you must outwit magical wards and ruthless guards to reclaim your freedom before the next moon rises.

title: Fenwater Crossing
description: A river barge carries you through the Fenwater Marshes at dusk. The bargeman refuses to speak, and something beneath the reeds keeps pace with the hull.
author: AI

title: Smoke Over Grainhall
description: Raiders descend on a farming town and its precious winter stores. You have hours to mount a defense, strike a deal, or find a way out.
author: AI

title: Gilded Tongues
description: A scribe attending a duke's feast discovers that not every smile at the high table is genuine. Trust no one, and choose your words with care.
author: AI

title: Dryland Hull
description: A landslide above Carren's Mill has uncovered a ship in the hills, miles from any coast. You climb aboard to find its cargo still sealed and its timbers warm to the touch.
author: AI

title: Pitfighter's Bargain
description: Chained fighters enter the pits of Velkash, where three wins promise freedom. No one has ever collected.
author: AI

title: Velvet Trespass
description: A merchant prince keeps a stolen relic locked behind silk curtains and hired blades. Tonight you slip inside to take it back.
author: AI

title: Molten Whispers
description: A master glassblower's shop sits open and empty at dawn. Molten glass still bubbles on the shelf, and something trapped inside the orbs is trying to speak.
author: AI

title: Smoke and Cider
description: A crossroads inn hums with firelight and argument as evening falls. You only meant to rest your legs, but the night has other plans.
author: AI

title: Warden of the Pyre
description: A relief warden climbs Greymount at dusk to find the signal-pyre dark, the tower door clawed open from inside, and the previous keeper gone.
author: AI

title: Frosthollow Pass
description: A mountain guide leads a stranded merchant caravan through a blizzard-choked pass. The trail splits, the wind howls, and something stalks the tree line.
author: AI

title: Parley at Ashford Bridge
description: Two armies camp on opposite banks of the River Ash, and you carry the only letter that might prevent a war. The bridge between them is neutral ground - for now.
author: AI

title: Copper and Misdirection
description: A rigged wager at the Thornmarket Festival has ruined a dozen honest traders. You plan to beat the cheat at his own game, but the crowd is watching and you only get one chance.
author: AI

title: Drowning Gallery
description: A collapsed mine entrance seals you underground with rising floodwater and a single sputtering torch. Somewhere below, the river finds its way out. You need to find it first.
author: AI

title: Lanternwake
description: A fishing skiff offers passage through waters that glow at night. Three days saved, if you survive what stirs beneath the sunken city of Mirren.
author: AI

title: Holdfast
description: A skeleton garrison, a wounded commander, and an army in the valley below. Two days until relief arrives. The walls are cracked and the choices are yours.
author: AI

title: Hollowfield
description: A ranger arrives at a quiet village to find every door open, every meal half-eaten, and not a single soul in sight.
author: AI

title: Quiet Hands
description: A masquerade ball, a stolen treaty, and one night to take it back. Every mask hides a motive, including yours.
author: AI

title: Crucible Run
description: The guild accepts one new member each year, chosen by whoever survives the Crucible first. Twenty runners line up at dawn. The fortress does not care who wins.
author: AI

title: Gilded Descent
description: Cracked pillars in the desert mark the entrance to a sealed vault. What waits below is worth more than gold, if you survive long enough to find out.
author: AI

title: Sworn Ground
description: Two feuding clans meet at an ancient stone circle to settle a border dispute. You are the appointed voice between them, and the ground they stand on remembers every broken promise.
author: AI

title: Bellwright's Toll
description: A hilltop town summons you to recast its cracked cathedral bell. The bronze melts green, the furnace speaks in riddles, and the old Warden holds more than just a tone.
author: AI

title: Vanishing Ink
description: A canal-district mapmaker has vanished, leaving behind a half-finished chart that moves when you look away. The ink is alive, and it remembers every coast.
author: AI

title: Crooked Wager
description: A rigged card game in a traveling carnival holds a farmer's stolen compass. To win it back, you must out-trick the trickster at his own table.
author: AI

title: Saltrock Rising
description: A bell tolls three times in the cliff-side prison of Saltrock. The king tide is coming, and the lower cells will flood by midnight.
author: AI

title: Tidecaller's Wake
description: Fog swallows your merchant ship in the Graymist Straits. The compass spins, the sea glows green, and something vast stirs beneath the keel.
author: AI

title: Ashwater Bridge
description: A warlord's army surrounds the last bridge fortress on the Ashwater, and you arrive just as the road closes behind you.
author: AI

title: Hollowroot
description: A dead oak splits open in a sacred grove, revealing carved steps spiraling into its roots. The bark still pulses with warmth, and whatever lives at the heart of the tree is listening.
author: AI

title: Falcon Crest
description: Your family's stolen falcon crest sits somewhere inside Lord Maren's lakeside villa. Fifty feast guests, hired guards, and a locked vault stand between you and the silver wings.
author: AI

title: Scarred Laurels
description: A border-town arena hosts its annual tournament, but this year the Laurel Crown carries a weight no champion expects.
author: AI

title: Gravewater
description: Your waterskin is almost empty and the desert offers no mercy. Somewhere beneath the red canyon lies a buried city with a well that never runs dry.
author: AI

title: Ember Accords
description: Two warring clans meet at a neutral temple to sign a truce, but someone has poisoned the wine and both sides blame you.
author: AI

title: Lantern Festival
description: A rivertown's yearly lantern launch is hours away, but the festival organizer has vanished and the floating stage is sinking. Someone has to hold it all together.
author: AI

title: Molten Prism
description: A dying glassblower offers to teach you her final technique - a lens that reveals hidden truths. But the sand she needs comes from a quarry that someone very powerful wants kept sealed.
author: AI

title: Warden's Ledger
description: A lighthouse keeper is found dead at the top of his tower with every door locked from inside. The coastal village hires you to find the truth before the next tide.
author: AI

title: Foxglove Gambit
description: A traveling con artist recruits you for one last score: swap a countess's cursed ruby for a fake before the gem drives her mad. The catch - the countess knows you are coming.
author: AI

title: Salt-Bone Wreck
description: A merchant captain hires you to dive a sunken galleon for its lost manifest, but the wreck holds more than gold and the tide is turning fast.
author: AI

title: Wolfthroat Pass
description: A mountain monastery is surrounded by mercenary raiders hunting a fugitive scholar. The abbot will not surrender him, and the gates will not hold past dawn.
author: AI

title: Stargazer's Folly
description: An astronomer's tower has gone silent for three nights. The observatory's apprentice begs you to climb its spiraling stairs and find what has stopped the master from coming down.
author: AI

title: Whisper Court
description: Tonight the queen signs a treaty that will hand the borderlands to a foreign duchy. You have three hours to steal the unsigned draft before her seal touches it.
author: AI

title: Hollow Strings
description: A traveling lutemaker arrives at the harvest fair with a flawless instrument and a grudge. To win the bardic contest, you must out-craft a rival and out-play him on the same stage.
author: AI

title: Hollow Mountain
description: A rope party of three vanished in the mountain caves last week. You promised the village you would search for them. Your lantern oil will not last past midnight.
author: AI
